server.name: prachathipat-inventory-mcp
server.title: ระบบวัสดุคงคลัง โรงพยาบาลประชาธิปัตย์ (MCP)

tools.name: list_materials
tools.title: List materials
tools.description: List all materials (วัสดุ) in the hospital inventory, including id, name, category, and unit. Optionally filter by a substring match on id or name.

search.description: Optional substring to match against material id or name.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 200).

tools.name: get_stock_balance
tools.title: Get stock balance
tools.description: Compute current stock balance for each material by aggregating all stock-in and stock-out transactions. Optionally filter by material id.

material_id.description: Optional material id (e.g. B1) to return balance for a single material.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.title: List stock transactions
tools.description: List stock-in (รับเข้า) or stock-out (เบิก) transactions. Optionally filter by material id and by ISO date range (YYYY-MM-DD).

type.description: 'in' for stock-in (รับเข้า), 'out' for stock-out (เบิก).
